title: Rithvik Credits Net Game Improvement for Recent Success
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik, who won the Valence Alpes International title, is aiming for the world's top 50.
summary: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik credits his improved net game for his recent success, including the Valence Alpes International title, and aims to break into the world's top 50.

title: Achutaditya and Arjun Exit Canada Open in First Round
indian_angle: The Indian men's doubles pair of Achutaditya and Arjun faced an early exit from the Canada Open.
summary: Indian men's doubles pair Achutaditya and Arjun were defeated by fifth-seeded Kevin Lee and Ty Alexander Lindeman in the first round of the Canada Open.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a loss in the final, where he faltered at the last step.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship in US Open Final Run Highlighted
indian_angle: This story highlights Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth's exceptional sportsmanship during his journey to the US Open final.
summary: A notable moment of sportsmanship by Kidambi Srikanth during his US Open final campaign is recounted, where he famously overturned a point given to him.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a major upset by defeating the World No. 6 at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by defeating the World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.
